## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all` — no format changes
- [ ] `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings` — no warnings
- [ ] `cargo test --workspace` — all pass
- [ ] Docs updated if public API or behaviour changed
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated under `[Unreleased]`
